## [00:00 - 01:08]

So I'm going to play you an audio of a pianist playing a song. Listening to that, I am very sure you know what nursery rhyme that is. So I'm going to play you another one now, except with this one. Think about how it makes you feel when you're listening to it. Music You see, what you just experienced was two different musicians playing their instrument. They're playing the same song. Yet with the first song you heard, you only heard the notes. That helped you recognize, yes, it's twinkle, twinkle, little star. But the second musician, the second pianist, when he was playing it, all of a sudden, not only did you hear the notes and recognize the song, it did one extra thing. It makes you feel. And that's the key to great communication is that people don't just hear what you say, they feel what you say.
